amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 62 — paragraph 3 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 62 — paragraph 3 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3 a. National supervisory authorities shall on an annual basis notify the AI Office of the serious incidents reported to them in accordance with this Article.
parliament_text: 3 a. National supervisory authorities shall on an annual basis notify the AI Office of the serious incidents reported to them in accordance with this Article.
